Banner.Description: I have +3 years of experience developing enterprise systems, web applications, and technological solutions. My expertise lies in building clean, reusable, and scalable code using Angular, C#, SQL Server, and React, while also applying strong practices in database design and backend development. I am committed to writing maintainable code, optimizing performance, and delivering solutions that meet both business and user needs.
AboutMe.Title: About Me
AboutMe.Paragraphs: With 3+ years of experience, I have contributed in several roles: Frontend Developer, Backend Developer, and System Developer. I am passionate about building applications that solve real-world problems and improve user experiences.
My capabilities include developing enterprise systems, optimizing performance, standardizing patterns, and suggesting as well as implementing ideas that add value to every project I work on.
I also enjoy creating tools and utilities for my personal use, whether for learning, experimentation, or productivity.
Some of the technologies I have trained and worked with include (but are not limited to):
Experience.Title: Experience

Experience.Jobs.Title: Development Manager / Senior Fullstack Developer
Description: Started as a Junior Developer and quickly advanced to Senior Fullstack Developer and Development Manager within the technology department.
Leading the development team, setting technical direction, and ensuring high-quality software delivery.
Designing and developing scalable enterprise systems.
Collaborating with stakeholders to gather requirements, analyze business processes, and deliver effective software solutions.
Mentoring and guiding junior developers, fostering a culture of clean code and best practices.
Overseeing system architecture, performance optimization, and implementation of coding standards.
Managing project planning, sprint reviews, and reporting meetings to ensure on-time and successful delivery.

Experience.Jobs.Title: Digital Payment Officer
Description: Managed and monitored digital payment systems to ensure smooth and secure transactions.
Supported the integration of digital payment solutions with enterprise applications.
Provided technical assistance and troubleshooting for payment-related issues.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to improve system efficiency and user experience.
Prepared reports and documentation on payment system performance and operations.

Experience.Jobs.Title: Fullstack Developer (Freelancer)
Description: Delivered fullstack development services for various clients, covering both frontend and backend solutions.
Developed web platforms using Angular, Laravel, and WordPress, applying clean architecture and best coding practices.
Implemented process automation and optimized workflows through custom scripts and data structures.
Designed and customized responsive templates using SASS, Bootstrap, Angular Material, and other UI frameworks.
Collaborated with clients to gather requirements, provide technical guidance, and deliver tailored solutions on time.

Experience.Jobs.Title: Fullstack Developer
Description: Developed and maintained a spatial land management system integrating GIS technologies with enterprise applications.
Worked with GeoServer and Leaflet to visualize and manage spatial data, including interactive maps and geospatial queries.
Built and consumed RESTful APIs using .NET for backend services, ensuring secure and efficient data exchange.
Designed and implemented frontend modules in Angular with complex reactive forms and map-based interactions.
Collaborated with domain experts to support land administration workflows and improve decision-making through spatial analysis.
Optimized system performance, data rendering, and user experience for large-scale geospatial datasets.
Participated in project planning, reporting, and cross-team collaboration to ensure timely delivery of milestones.

FeatureProjects.Title: My Projects
FeatureProjects.Label: Highlighted Project

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: Land Management Of Addis Ababa
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: Web application for land and spatial management that supports property registration, plot coordination, and administrative workflows. The system is extensive and complex, built with Angular, .NET, and GeoServer, and integrates a spatial module using Leaflet with Angular for interactive map visualization and web-based spatial registration. PostgreSQL is used for property and plot coordinate storage and is integrated with GeoServer for geospatial visualization, while SQL Server with .NET APIs handles business data manipulation, processing, and reporting.

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: Lucy ERP
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: An ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) system is a software platform that helps organizations manage and integrate their core business processes in one centralized system. It connects different departments, such as finance, human resources, procurement, inventory, sales, and customer management—so they can share data and work more efficiently. made with Angular and .NET for attendance managent. The MSSQL server Database for data storing.

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: Petroleum and Energy Authority
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: A Petroleum Licensing Management System is a specialized software solution designed to manage, regulate, and monitor the issuance of licenses in the petroleum sector across different authority levels. This system supports government agencies or regulatory bodies in handling applications, approvals, renewals, and compliance for businesses involved in petroleum activities such as fuel stations, transportation, storage, and distribution. It has an email module, real-time notifications, Payment method for exam. Developed in Angular , .NET And MSSQL with API.

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: Ethiopia's Water Resources
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: Developed a system for managing Ethiopia’s water resources to monitor and address potential water emergencies during the summer season. Fully customized design with plugins developed from scratch. Integrated with multiple water monitoring sites to collect measurements and perform predictive analysis based on the sites data using Grafana tool. Developed in Angular for Frontend, MSSQL with .NET API for Backend ,Geoserver with leaflet for showing site map.

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: EMR
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: E-commerce platform for technology products. Developed with WordPress and implementing a shipping system for products. It has sales reporting through customized programming.

Contact.Title: Say Hi!
Contact.Content: I will be glad to hear from you if you want to discuss new opportunities. Write to me, and I will respond as soon as I see your message.
